## Now
<!-- narrative:start -->
**Focus:** TradeForge workflow is wired — Forgejo (source of truth) -> GitHub push-mirror
(BlinkyBill24) -> claude.ai web Project. Built on top of the existing AGENTS.md game brain.

**Last shipped:** Workflow Phases 1-3 — git/Claude branch guards, docs system
(learnings / features / _digest / handbook), status+digest+refresh scripts, `.claude`
hooks + the `/reflect` skill, and STATE.md itself. On branch `chore/workflow-setup`.

**Next:** Merge `chore/workflow-setup` -> `main` on Forgejo (mirrors to GitHub -> Sync the
web Project). Then resume game work: player/companion sprite scaling + in-editor path tuning.

**Watch out for:** fresh clones need `git config core.hooksPath .githooks`; keep the web
Project to < 13 curated files (STATE.md first).
<!-- narrative:end -->
